seoTitle: Pelican Creek vs Pentland — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pelican Creek and Pentland. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pelican Creek vs Pentland: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pelican Creek and Pentland.
heading: Pelican Creek vs Pentland — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pelican Creek, Queensland and Pentland, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pelican Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Pentland (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pelican Creek or Pentland safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pelican Creek has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Pentland scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pelican Creek scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Pentland scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pelican Creek or Pentland?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pelican Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
